query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN imageUrl IS NOT NULL AND imageUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as con_imagen,
  SUM(CASE WHEN imageUrl IS NULL OR imageUrl = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sin_imagen
FROM recipes WHERE active = 1;
